title: Project JJK Reimargined
description: A Resource Pack that tries to enhance the visual for the Project JJK mod by JAESU.
body:
This resource pack was created with the goal of reimagining JAESU's ProjectJJK mod in my own style.

In addition, it also includes some extra features for vanilla Minecraft and other popular mods that you might use while playing with the mod.

This pack isn’t 100% finished, and it’s not fully updated to the newest Minecraft versions either, since it was originally made for Minecraft 1.20.1 when the mod was first released.
I’ve updated a few of the newer textures, but I’m not sure if I’ll continue working on it.
If I see positive feedback, I probably will!

Some edited assets included in this pack :

- Minecraft GUI
- Project JJK
- ToroHealth Damage Indicators (updated)
- Advancement Plaques
- And more!

For any issue with this pack contact me on Discord patroller226
